blended.narrative: Tuckerman Ravine is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.3 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 4,616 ft. Looking ahead, 15 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 2.3" of snow, highs of 44°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: light rain, highs of 43°F, gusts to 42 mph.
Wednesday: 3.9" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 6" of snow, highs of 28°F, gusts to 49 mph. Expect powder.
